# WeBot Agency

> WeBot Agency builds and runs reviewed AI agent work for business and personal tasks.

Canonical site: https://webot.agency/
Studio checkout and dashboard: https://webot.studio/
Contact: hello@webot.agency

## Primary offers

- Plan & Itinerary: vacation itineraries, date nights, business get-togethers, road trips, reservation checklists, route plans, backup ideas, and helpful supply notes.
- Gather & Extract: website research, scraping, OCR, PDF extraction, invoice/document cleanup, spreadsheets, source notes, and structured exports.
- Create & Polish: greeting cards, thank-you cards, social posts, tone rewrites, logo concepts, business cards, and simple brand notes.
- Build & Automate: code review, code writing, spreadsheet formulas, workflow automation, skills, runbooks, and technical handoffs.
- Review & Decide: research, comparison briefs, decision memos, vendor summaries, executive briefs, and fact-check packs.

## Delivery model

Customers choose monthly access or a one-time reviewed job in WeBot Studio. Paid work moves through intake, agent routing, draft production, lead review, fresh-context review, customer approval, and final delivery.

## Important pages

- Homepage and offers: https://webot.agency/
- Discovery call: https://webot.agency/consultation.html
- Privacy policy: https://webot.agency/privacy.html
- Studio: https://webot.studio/
